films.title: Monkeybone
films.overview: After a car crash sends repressed cartoonist Stu into a coma, he and the mischievous Monkeybone, his hilarious alter-ego, wake up in a wacked-out waystation for lost souls. When Monkeybone takes over Stu's body and escapes to wreak havoc on the real world, Stu has to find a way to stop him before his sister pulls the plug on reality forever!

films.title: Rebound
films.overview: An acclaimed college hoops coach is demoted to a junior varsity team after a public meltdown.

films.title: About Last Night...
films.overview: A man and woman meet and try to have a romantic affair, despite their personal problems and the interference of their disapproving friends.

films.title: Smashed
films.overview: Kate and Charlie like to have a good time. Their marriage thrives on a shared fondness for music, laughter… and getting smashed. When Kate’s partying spirals into hard-core asocial behavior, compromising her job as an elementary schoolteacher, something’s got to give. But change isn’t exactly a cakewalk. Sobriety means she will have to confront the lies she’s been spinning at work, her troubling relationship with her mother, and the nature of her bond with Charlie.

films.title: Date and Switch
films.overview: Two guys who make a pact to lose their virginity before prom find their friendship tested when one of them comes out of the closet.

films.title: Crush
films.overview: When an aspiring young artist is forced to join her high school track team, she uses it as an opportunity to pursue the girl she's been harboring a long-time crush on. But she soon finds herself falling for an unexpected teammate and discovers what real love feels like.

films.title: The Kings of Summer
films.overview: Three restless teenagers run away to the woods for the summer, determined to escape their parents and live by their own rules. In a hidden clearing, they build a makeshift house and attempt to create an independent life, testing their friendship, freedom, and the challenges of living off the land.

films.title: Why Him?
films.overview: A dad forms a bitter rivalry with his daughter's young rich boyfriend.

films.title: Alexander and the Terrible, Horrible, No Good, Very Bad Day
films.overview: Alexander's day begins with gum stuck in his hair, followed by more calamities. Though he finds little sympathy from his family and begins to wonder if bad things only happen to him, his mom, dad, brother, and sister all find themselves living through their own terrible, horrible, no good, very bad day.

films.title: Where'd You Go, Bernadette
films.overview: When architect-turned-recluse Bernadette Fox goes missing prior to a family trip to Antarctica, her 15-year-old daughter, Bee, goes on a quest with Bernadette's husband to find her.
